personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | AWS Data Platform & AI/ML Pipeline Specialist

summary: AWS Data Engineer specializing in ML-enabled pipelines and scalable data platforms. With over 20 years of experience, the candidate excel in building ETL pipelines with AWS (S3, Glue, Redshift), Python, and PySpark, while leveraging ML forecasting tools like Prophet and scikit-learn for advanced analytics. Proven track record in handling large-scale telemetry data and optimizing data warehousing solutions.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Architected automated ETL pipelines using Python/Pandas to ingest P95 telemetry from 6,000+ endpoints, enhancing data processing efficiency.
Built hybrid AWS/Oracle data platform with S3 for raw telemetry, AWS Glue for ETL, and Redshift for ML forecasting workloads at scale.
Developed ML forecasting models with Prophet and scikit-learn, achieving 90%+ accuracy in predicting capacity bottlenecks 6 months ahead.
Migrated heavy ML workloads from on-prem Oracle to Redshift, enabling parallel forecasting and cloud-scale analytics.
Designed optimized Oracle schemas for historical data retention, supporting seasonal risk forecasting and data warehousing strategies.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Managed Dynatrace AppMon/Synthetics monitoring for critical hospitality systems, ensuring data integrity and performance.
Led data mining of real-user performance metrics using Gomez Synthetic Monitoring, driving optimization recommendations.
Participated in AWS cloud migration planning, providing APM readiness assessments for data platform transitions.

experience.title: SME for CA APM (Senior Consultant)
bullets: Managed large-scale CA APM environments, supporting data extraction and performance reporting with Perl/Ksh scripts.
Designed custom dashboards and alerts for performance monitoring, enhancing data visibility across enterprise systems.
Collaborated with J2EE/WebLogic teams to resolve bottlenecks, ensuring efficient data flow and system performance.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

skills.Cloud & Data: AWS (S3, Glue, Redshift, Athena), PySpark, Apache Spark, Hive/Hadoop, Data Warehousing, ETL Design
skills.Tools & Infra: Pandas, Airflow, Docker, Git, Linux/Unix, Streamlit

projects.name: Serverless Lakehouse Platform (AWS)
projects.description: Designed a full serverless data platform using S3, Glue, Athena, and Bedrock, with a Text-to-SQL GenAI agent using Claude 3 Sonnet. Resolved small file issues with Snappy + Parquet compression for enterprise-scale ETL optimization.

projects.name: HorizonScale — AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
projects.description: Developed an AI-driven capacity forecasting engine with Python, PySpark, and Streamlit, reducing forecasting cycles by 90%. Used Prophet and scikit-learn for bottleneck prediction 6 months ahead.
